---
# title: "index"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

<!-- Check out the interactive tool below: -->

<!-- <iframe height="1000" width="100%" frameborder="no" src="https://spatialplanning.shinyapps.io/mico_dev/"> </iframe> -->
<style>
  /* Remove default Quarto padding/margins for this page */
  #quarto-content {
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
  }

  .fullscreen-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    /* CSS fallback: assume ~60px navbar. JS will correct this. */
    height: calc(100vh - 60px);
    background: #f8f9fa;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .loader {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    border: 6px solid #f3f3f3;
    border-top: 6px solid #2ecc71;
    border-radius: 50%;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
    z-index: 10;
  }

  #map-iframe {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border: none;
    display: block;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease-in;
  }

  @keyframes spin {
    0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); }
    100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
  }
</style>

<div class="fullscreen-container">
  <div id="loader" class="loader"></div>
  <iframe
    id="map-iframe"
    src="https://spatialplanning.shinyapps.io/mico_dev/"
    onload="hideLoader()">
  </iframe>
</div>

<script>
function setContainerHeight() {
  var header = document.getElementById('quarto-header') ||
               document.querySelector('header.navbar') ||
               document.querySelector('nav.navbar') ||
               document.querySelector('header');
  var headerHeight = header ? header.offsetHeight : 0;

  var footer = document.getElementById('quarto-footer') ||
               document.querySelector('footer');
  var footerHeight = footer ? footer.offsetHeight : 0;

  var availableHeight = window.innerHeight - headerHeight - footerHeight;

  var container = document.querySelector('.fullscreen-container');
  var iframe = document.getElementById('map-iframe');

  if (container) {
    container.style.height = availableHeight + 'px';
  }
  // Also set iframe height directly — don't rely solely on height:100% inheritance
  if (iframe) {
    iframe.style.height = availableHeight + 'px';
  }
}

function hideLoader() {
  document.getElementById('loader').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('map-iframe').style.opacity = '1';
}

// Run immediately, on DOMContentLoaded, and on resize
setContainerHeight();
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setContainerHeight);
window.addEventListener('load', setContainerHeight);
window.addEventListener('resize', setContainerHeight);
</script>
